analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal flip transformation required to interpret the mirror image correctly before calculating the time offset.
The agent misread the mirror-flipped clock face (7:10 instead of 4:10) and performed incorrect arithmetic.
The agent misread the mirror-flipped clock face. The hour hand is between 4 and 5, and the minute hand is at 2 (10 minutes), making the time 4:10, not 7:10.
The agent correctly flipped the image but misread the time on the corrected clock (reading 7:10 instead of 4:10).
